arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah contract update: Liverpool star on brink of new deal as forward pushes Arne Slot's side towards Premier League title
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is reportedly on the brink of signing a new contract with Liverpool and extending his stay on Merseyside beyond the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool strike Mo Salah agreement as star set to end speculation with new contract
arts.sum: The uncertainty surrounding Mo Salah's future at Liverpool has been a constant talking point throughout this season at Anfield, but both parties have finally reached an agreement

arts.ttl: William Saliba pledges future to Arsenal as Liverpool fired Premier League title warning
arts.sum: INTERVIEW: William Saliba, speaking as part of an inspiring community visit to a local primary school in Islington, has revealed he hopes to stay at Arsenal for a long time ahead of Sunday's trip to Fulham in a welcome boost for Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Report: Big Mohamed Salah contract update as 'influential members' at Liverpool make one key decision
Erling Haaland and Kyle Walker moment sums up worrying Man City decline as Liverpool watch on
arts.sum: Man City's title hopes took another hit as they were held to a 2-2 draw by Crystal Palace in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher claims Trent Alexander-Arnold can delay Real Madrid decision beyond 2025
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to step up their transfer push for Trent Alexander-Arnold at the start of 2025. Alexander-Arnold is out of contract at Liverpool at the end of the 2024/25 season with talks on an extension ongoing. arts.ttl: Everton make offer to Australian fan after 10,000-mile journey for postponed Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Mackenzie Kinsella, 15, had travelled from Australia to watch Saturday’s game against Liverpool but Storm Darragh forced the game to be postponed

arts.sum: Manchester City, who ended a six-game unbeaten run in all competitions last weekend, lost points at Crystal Palace after drawing 2-2
